summary: Complete testing of Code Red Initiatives v4 - Major Update: Risk removed, Business Outcomes CRUD with modals, KPI History tracking, Drag-drop Pipeline. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright (100%).

design_issues.issue: Nested buttons warning - buttons for Add/Edit/Delete are nested inside the category toggle button. This causes HTML validation warning in console: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'
design_issues.recommendation: Convert outer button to div with onClick handler, keeping inner buttons as is

Dashboard Stats API returns all required fields without Risk - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows 4 summary stat cards: Initiatives(5), Projects(4), Outcomes(3), KPIs(11) - SUCCESS
Pipeline API returns 4 status columns (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress) - SUCCESS
Pipeline API supports drag-drop move endpoint - SUCCESS
Pipeline initiatives have nested projects - SUCCESS
Business Outcomes Tree API returns 3-level hierarchy (Category → Sub-Outcomes → KPIs) - SUCCESS
Category CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) - SUCCESS
Sub-Outcome CRUD - SUCCESS
KPI CRUD with progress calculation - SUCCESS
KPI History endpoint returns historical data - SUCCESS
KPI update creates history entry - SUCCESS
Strategic Initiatives CRUD with projects_count - SUCCESS
Projects CRUD with embedded milestones and issues - SUCCESS
Project Milestone CRUD - SUCCESS
Project Issue CRUD - SUCCESS
Initiative statuses config returns 4 statuses - SUCCESS
Project statuses config returns 4 statuses - SUCCESS

Navigation shows only 2 items: Executive Dashboard, Business Outcomes (no Risk) - SUCCESS
Add Initiative button opens new initiative form - SUCCESS
Business Outcomes page shows 3 categories expandable - SUCCESS
Add Category button opens modal - SUCCESS
KPI History button opens modal with weekly data - SUCCESS
Project Detail page shows milestones and issues with CRUD - SUCCESS
Drag handles visible on pipeline cards - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: BusinessOutcomes.jsx line 322-367: Nested buttons cause HTML validation warning. The category header uses a <button> element containing child <button> elements for Add/Edit/Delete actions. Consider using a <div> with role='button' for the outer element.
Navigation simplified correctly - Risk completely removed from sidebar
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates: 3 categories (ETO, Quality, PDSL), 7 sub-outcomes, 11 KPIs with weekly history data, 5 strategic initiatives (ETO-WIP, Quality-Discovery, Planning/Manufacturing Visibility/Intercompany-Not Started), 4 projects (3 under ETO, 1 under Quality) with milestones and issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major update complete and verified. Changes: 1) Risk completely removed from backend and frontend. 2) Business Outcomes now has full CRUD via modals for Categories, Sub-Outcomes, and KPIs. 3) KPI History tracking with weekly historical data seeded and viewable via History button. 4) Drag-and-drop Pipeline using @hello-pangea/dnd library with 4 columns. 5) Project detail page shows milestones/issues with CRUD. 6) Navigation simplified to 2 items only. Minor HTML nesting warning in BusinessOutcomes.jsx.

risk_removal.backend: No risk endpoints, no risk fields in stats
risk_removal.frontend: No Risk nav item, no risk sections
